description: Electric motors and generators (excluding generating sets)

Tricycles, scooters, pedal cars and similar wheeled toys; dolls; other toys
Toys (tricycles, dolls, puzzles, reduced-scale models and similar)
Other headgear, whether or not lined or trimmed
